query:
SELECT
      ts,
      event_kind,
      token0_symbol,
      round(amount0, 6) AS amount0,
      token1_symbol,
      round(amount1, 6) AS amount1,
      round(amount_usd, 2) AS amount_usd,
      lp,
      tx_hash
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_pool_explorer_liquidity_events
    WHERE 1 = 1
      /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
    ORDER BY ts DESC
    LIMIT 200
